args:
echo "DF03B_NONPROD_SMOKE_START"
echo "PROJECT_ID=${PROJECT_ID}"
echo "REPO_NAME=${REPO_NAME}"
echo "BRANCH_NAME=${BRANCH_NAME}"
echo "COMMIT_SHA=${COMMIT_SHA}"
echo "SHORT_SHA=${SHORT_SHA}"
echo "PWD=$(pwd)"
echo "ROOT_FILE_LIST_BEGIN"
find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort | sed -n '1,200p'
echo "ROOT_FILE_LIST_END"
gcloud run services describe "${_SERVICE_NAME}" \
  --project="${_PLATFORM_PROJECT}" \
  --region="${_REGION}" \
  --format="value(metadata.name,status.url)"
echo "DF03B_NONPROD_SMOKE_PASS"
steps.name: gcr.io/google.com/cloudsdktool/cloud-sdk:slim

description: PetCare DF03B nonprod smoke — inline (restored after DF04 STOP)
name: petcare-nonprod-main
